_comment: Multi-family real-LLM ladder config. Each entry: LM Studio model key + metadata. active_b/total_b in billions; MoE models have active<<total. To add a family, download it in LM Studio and append an entry here (e.g. Llama, Mistral, DeepSeek, Phi) at a matched active-param point. Results are NOT part of `make repro` (provider nondeterminism); they are logged with model id + prompt_digest + date.
